title: daemon/api: internal error strings leaked in HTTP 500 responses
description: Three error sites in daemon/src/api.rs (~lines 184, 260, 333) use format!("...: {e}") as the JSON message field in 500 responses. The anyhow chain includes SQLite file paths, gRPC transport errors, and internal context strings. Fix: log {e} internally at warn/error and return a fixed opaque string (e.g. 'internal wallet error') to callers.
